title: Spicy Algerian Tomato Stir-fry
description: A fresh and silky algerian dish featuring smoked paprika, marinate, suitable for whole30 diet with light seasoning to keep it low in fat.
instructions: Chop tomatoes, onion and garlic into small pieces.
Heat olive oil in a wok or skillet over medium-high heat. Add chopped onions and sauté for about 2 minutes until translucent.
Add minced garlic to the pan; cook for an additional 30 seconds.
Push onions and garlic aside and add tomatoes to the pan. Stir occasionally for about 5-7 minutes, allowing the tomatoes to release their juices.
Stir in red pepper flakes, smoked paprika, salt, and parsley. Cook for another minute until flavors are well combined.
